title: May 30-31 Training Weekend
description: Two-day lake training. Saturday at Marina Putrajaya, Sunday at Subang PARC. Open to all paddlers — sign up for one day or both.
thumbnailCredit: Photo by Elliot Andrews on Unsplash

title: June 27-28 Training Weekend
description: Race-prep weekend. Both sessions at Marina Putrajaya. Focus on starts, exchanges, and 500m time trials.
thumbnailCredit: Photo by Elliot Andrews on Unsplash
